page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is provisioned with 12.0 GB of system memory, yielding a strict 1.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage for boot and data volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

The hardware profile presents a distinct tradeoff, offering high dedicated CPU core density alongside a constrained memory footprint. With a 1:1 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is structured for workloads that require parallel processing power without substantial memory overhead. From a resource density perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance, avoiding the resource contention typical of shared-core environments. However, the lack of local storage and the modest 2 Gbps network baseline require careful architecture planning for I/O-heavy operations.

This server type is suited for compute-bound tasks with low memory requirements. Appropriate workloads include parallel batch processing, lightweight web serving, distributed compute nodes, and basic CPU-bound utility services. It is less suitable for database hosting, large-scale data analytics, or memory-intensive applications due to the 12 GB memory limitation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.3xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs with a single thread per core, paired with 12.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a strict 1:1 ratio of vCPUs to gigabytes of RAM, highlighting a design optimized for parallel compute tasks with minimal memory requirements. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external network storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. This resource profile offers a cost-effective option for dedicated CPU processing where memory capacity is not a bottleneck. It is best suited for batch processing, lightweight web servers, and distributed compute nodes.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.3xlarge is an x86_64 KVM instance featuring 12 dedicated physical cores, 12 GB of RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, designed for compute-heavy workloads with low memory requirements.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.3xlarge is an x86_64 KVM server with 12 dedicated cores, 12 GB RAM, and no local storage, optimized for low-memory compute tasks.
tagline: A dedicated twelve-core compute instance with a lean memory footprint, optimized for parallel processing tasks without local storage overhead.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
12.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:1 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
KVM hypervisor-backed virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation
No bundled local storage or GPU hardware
Best suited for parallel batch processing and lightweight web serving
